org.jenkinsci.plugins.github.pullrequest.title: Merge to tag jdk-22+34
org.jenkinsci.plugins.github.pullrequest.pollingLog: Running GitHub Pull Request trigger check for Feb 5, 2024, 10:58:00 PM on SAP/SapMachine GitHub rate limit before check: GHRateLimit {core {remaining=4202, limit=5000, resetDate=Mon Feb 05 23:26:46 UTC 2024}, search {remaining=30, limit=30, resetDate=Mon Feb 05 22:59:00 UTC 2024}, graphql {remaining=5000, limit=5000, resetDate=Mon Feb 05 23:58:00 UTC 2024}, integrationManifest {remaining=5000, limit=5000, resetDate=Mon Feb 05 23:58:00 UTC 2024}} PR [#1599 Merge to tag jdk-23+8] not changed PR [#1598 Merge to tag jdk-11.0.23+1] not changed PR [#1597 Merge to tag jdk-17.0.11+1] not changed PR [#1596 Merge to tag jdk-21.0.3+1] not changed PR [#1594 Implement a lean alternative for jcmd] not changed PR [#1551 New malloc trace implementation] not changed GitHubPRCommitEvent: new commit found, sha 99b3db57bf3696d56ab938f7527246fba3c289fc No matching comments found for 1600

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: SAPMACHINE_GIT_REPOSITORY
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: The Git repository to use.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: GIT_REF
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: The Git tag, branch or commit to build.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: SAPMACHINE_VERSION
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: Either a SapMachine Release Tag or a JDK Major version. If empty, GIT_REF is used.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: JDK_BUILD
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: Sets the version build number explicitly.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: SAPMACHINE_ARCHIVE_NAME_PREFIX
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: The prefix of the bundle archive.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: DEVKIT
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: Devkit, could be either a path that locally exists or the GAV coordinates to a tar.gz archive to be downloaded and extracted.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: EXTRA_CONFIGURE_OPTIONS
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: Extra configure options passed directly to configure script.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: hotspot_test_groups
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: Select the test group for jtreg hotspot tests. Empty means disabled.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: jdk_test_groups
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: Select the test group for jtreg jdk tests. Empty means disabled.

hudson.model.StringParameterValue.name: langtools_test_groups
hudson.model.StringParameterValue.description: Select the test group for jtreg langtools tests. Empty means disabled.
